sensor_emulation

Small Python application to emulate sensors in an MQTT environment.

#python#mqtt#iot#sensors

sensor_emulation is a small MQTT-focused application for emulating sensor behavior. It is relevant to IoT testing, local environments, and protocol-oriented experimentation.
